result: Validation complete. One minor section organization issue identified: the knowledge file combines two distinct h3-level subsections (prettyPrintタグ and rawWriteタグ) into a single section entry using markdown subsections, rather than splitting them into separate entries in the `sections` object as the large content size and clear logical separation would suggest.

findings.description: Source file has h2 heading with >= 2000 characters containing distinct h3-level subsections (prettyPrintタグ and rawWriteタグ), but knowledge file combines them into a single section entry with markdown subsections (###) instead of splitting into separate section entries in the sections object.
findings.source_evidence: Source RST has: main h2 'HTMLエスケープせずに値を出力する' with logical subsections for ':ref:`tag-pretty_print_tag`' and ':ref:`tag-raw_write_tag`' totaling >2000 chars. Knowledge file has only 1 entry: 'html-unescape-output' with markdown ### subsections inside the string content.
